free_text: Level densities of some medium weight nuclei from
evaporation spectra of the alpha particles from
Two Van de Graaff accelerators with
maximum energy of 1 MeV and 3 MeV.
The spectra are analysed with the statistical model
using optical model compound cross sections. A level
with E the excitation energy, and delta the pairing
energy was used, the parameter A was deduced from the
The spectra show typical evaporation form, and where
measured the angular distributions are symmetric
about 90 degrees, with a minimum at this angle.
SD: Ref. on EANDC-50 was corrected,
SD: Ref. on abstract deleted. Refs update.
